finding_results.notes: The chapter now completes the sexual bargain on-page, but leaves the fuel cans empty and the ledger line unwritten. The operational theft and falsified fuel math remain future pressure instead of resolving inside the closing unit.
Mina names the creek/access desire once at the dock. The later shed exchange no longer repeats the creek or fuel confession and instead escalates through Tomas's class risk and the ring/Rhea reality.

summary: Chapter 2 now preserves the bureaucratic ordeal and transactional erotic charge while ending on one irreversible bargain step: Mina has sex with Tomas, but the fuel lie remains unwritten future pressure. The later leverage beat no longer restates the same access ask and now advances through labor risk, marriage reality, and exposure.
